title: Scoped Crossbow
description: Adds a functional spyglass scope to the crossbow.
body:
# Minecraft's unOfficial Scoped Crossbow
Resource pack that adds a spyglass scope to the crossbow, which can be aimed when sneaking. It is a part of the [Minecraft unOfficial Proyect](https://modrinth.com/collection/hB55ZXtF).

In a completely unpredictable series of events, one of the most requested features since the upper echelons of Mojang announced the arrival of spyglasses back in the distant 1.14th century has finally arrived: the spyglass scope. This time, it's not from an official Minecraft source, but an unofficial one. This small resource pack adds a spyglass scope to the crossbow. Once charged, the player can aim with this new sight by pressing Shift (or the button selected for sneak attacks), improving long-range accuracy (despite not changing the zoom) and enhancing the power and presence of the almost forgotten weapon that is the crossbow.

----

Conditions:
- Redistribution of the assets in their original form is prohibited.
- Projects that imitate these assets with only minor changes are not allowed.
- Assets may not be used in ways that mislead about their original authorship.
- Projects that use these assets must provide the original place where the assets where obtained.
- Any form of credits must not be deleted.
- Proper credit must be given to the original author if requested, in the manner the author specify.

Extra Clause
- Minecraft developers are allowed to use these resources if they intend to implement them natively in the game.
